name: Slack
description: Send messages, search conversations, manage channels, and access Slack workspace data through AI chat.
setup_notes:
Requires a Slack Bot Token and Team ID.

Admin setup:
1. Go to https://api.slack.com/apps and create a new app (or use an existing one)
2. Under 'OAuth & Permissions', add the following Bot Token Scopes:
   - channels:history, channels:read
   - chat:write
   - groups:history, groups:read
   - im:history, im:read
   - mpim:history, mpim:read
   - users:read
   - search:read
   - files:read
3. Install the app to your workspace
4. Copy the 'Bot User OAuth Token' (starts with xoxb-)
5. Find your Team ID: open Slack in a browser, the URL contains the team ID (e.g., T01234ABCDE)
6. Enter the Bot Token and Team ID in the server configuration

Note: Slack also offers an official MCP server at mcp.slack.com (HTTP transport with first-party OAuth), but it requires Marketplace-published or internal apps. This template uses the community @modelcontextprotocol/server-slack package which works with any Slack app.
